issue: Right-rail sent attachment chips could extend beyond the visible chat panel when multiple attachments rendered near the rail edge.
layoutGuards: message text bubbles now use min-w-0/overflow-hidden/break-words
sent attachment rows now wrap inside w-full max-w-[94%] with no horizontal overflow
sent and staged attachment chips now have min-w-0/max-w-full/flex shrink constraints
chat scroll content now uses overflow-x-hidden

verification.computerUseObservedState: Release app right-rail attachment chips wrapped inside the panel. Long metadata text truncates inside the chip; the chip row no longer protrudes beyond the visible panel edge.
